/.title: Personal Finance with Tai Zhi - Secure Your Wealth Today.
/.description: Serving over 100+ happy customers, Tai Zhi brings Curated and Personalised Solutions for your Financial Goals. Secure Your Wealth Today.
h1: Curated and Personalised Solutions for your Financial Goals
p: Ngim Tai Zhi — AIA FA Financial Services Consultant
Authorised Representative of AIA Financial Advisers Pte Ltd (Reg. No 201715016G)
Tai Zhi (ChFC®/S, IBF Advanced) is Your Trusted Financial Consultant for Retirement, Investment, and Risk Management.
Experience peace of mind through comprehensive planning, asset allocation, and top-class servicing.
Navigate your path to financial freedom 5-10 years earlier with tailor-made portfolios.
Tai Zhi is also the multi-year recipient of various awards, including
The world of financial advice can be overwhelming. The sheer volume of information and options can lead to confusion and uncertainty.
Tai Zhi’s experience and deep knowledge in varying customers’ profiles delivers unique, tailored plans to you. Experience peace of mind with Tai Zhi.
Discover your financial plans and map the stars to get there.
Your journey, your rules. Tai Zhi tailors a path towards your financial ambitions.
Your personal blueprint that secures and grows your wealth.

Tai Zhi has been a great friend and advisor to us. As a freshly graduated couple, we were unsure of what to do with our income. He sat down with us to not just plan, but also to understand our habits, needs and wants.
Tai Zhi also took time to explain to us the different investments and insurances thoroughly suited to our life and is always available to answer our queries.

Tai Zhi has proven to be a highly reliable advisor thus far. Really appreciate his eagerness to provide up-to-date information on financial markets, and the best deals out there! (i.e. great credit cards for miles).
He is very knowledgeable in his field and is always able to give a comprehensive comparison of the various plans out there and how each of them matches up with my goals.

The past 5 years with Tai Zhi has been professional and delightful. He possesses a great understanding of personal finance and his ability to be analytical yet able to translate complex financial concepts into clear, actionable advice has been invaluable to me. He understands my goals, risk tolerance and preferences, tailoring a comprehensive financial plan that aligns perfectly with our needs.

Tai Zhi also consistently keeps us informed about new developments concerning our portfolio to ensure it is well balanced and prudent, and would regularly offer proactive advice on new developments. He remains easily reachable and approachable all these years!

Working with Tai Zhi over the past couple of years has not only brought significant tranquility to my financial life but also added a layer of trust and reliability that is hard to find. His profound expertise in financial planning and investment is evident, yet what strikes me most is his humility and honesty when faced with uncertainties, and always ensuring to seek out answers diligently.I experience peace of mind knowing that my finances are in his capable hands, is invaluable and allows me to focus on other aspects of life without any underlying worry about!
and he will personally schedule a call back.
